items.title: Minivan sales surge 21% in 2025 as millennial dads lead demand for cars offering the 'best bang for your buck'
items.description: Most carmakers are only focused on the truck and SUV buyer, but one model saw a surge in popularity last year — the trusty family minivan.

items.title: Corporate America faces growing shareholder pressure to talk about Trump’s immigration policies
